Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “The Negotiation” tool. This is going to be a very powerful tool you can use if people in
your group ﴾or yourself﴿ what to learn the secret to a win‐win negotiation. Most people have no idea how to properly negotiate for a win. It’s not about
you, it’s about them. And this tool will give you the framework to confidently walk into any negotiation.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down the people you are meeting withs ideal outcome.
Write down your ideal outcome.
Write down your story and why you are the person they need to reach their ideal outcomes.
What are the deal points that you and the people you are negotiating with would like to have come to life.
Now decide if these deal points are nice to have, something you want or something you must have.
Write down their greatest desires, their overarching goal and their biggest fears.
Write down your offer with how you can solve their desires, help them reach their goals and how you can ease their fears.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
